---
title: "Monthly Derived Survey Variables"
author: "Kelsey Sanchez"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
header-includes:  
    \usepackage[labelformat=empty]{caption}
    \usepackage{placeins}
    \usepackage{booktabs}
    \usepackage{pdflscape}
output:
  pdf_document:
      latex_engine: xelatex
      extra_dependencies: ["float"]
---




```{r libraries, include=FALSE}


#  pdf-engine: xelatex
#tinytex::install_tinytex()   ## only needs to be installed once 

library(bigrquery)
library(epiDisplay) ##recommended applied here crosstable, tab1
library(gmodels) ##recommended
library(arsenal)
library(gtsummary)
library(rio)



library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(scales)
library(gt)
library(tinytex)
library(data.table) ###to write or read and data management 
library(tidyverse) ###for data management
library(dplyr) ###data management
library(lubridate) ###date time
library(stringr) ###to work on patterns, characters
options(tinytex.verbose = TRUE)

bq_auth()

```




```{r merge1, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

## BQ Pull from the participants table just to use for versioning
project <- "nih-nci-dceg-connect-prod-6d04"
billing <- "nih-nci-dceg-connect-prod-6d04" 
recr_M1 <- bq_project_query(project, query="SELECT token,Connect_ID, d_821247024, d_914594314,  d_827220437,d_512820379,
                            d_949302066 , d_517311251  FROM  `nih-nci-dceg-connect-prod-6d04.FlatConnect.participants` WHERE  d_821247024='197316935' and d_949302066 ='231311385'")
recr_m1 <- bq_table_download(recr_M1,bigint = "integer64")
cnames <- names(recr_m1)
# Check that it doesn't match any non-number
numbers_only <- function(x) !grepl("\\D", x)
# to check variables in recr_noinact_wl1
for (i in 1: length(cnames)){
  varname <- cnames[i]
  var<-pull(recr_m1,varname)
  recr_m1[,cnames[i]] <- ifelse(numbers_only(var), as.numeric(as.character(var)), var)
}




#### Handling participants that somehow completed both Mod1 version 1 and Mod1 version 2

sql_M1_1 <- bq_project_query(project, 
                             query = "SELECT D_276353712, D_659784914, D_607773106_1_1, D_607773106_2_2, D_607773106_3_3, D_607773106_4_4, D_607773106_5_5, D_607773106_6_6, 
                             D_607773106_7_7,  D_607773106_8_8, D_607773106_9_9,  D_607773106_10_10, D_607773106_11_11, D_607773106_12_12, D_607773106_13_13, D_718867914_1_1, 
                             D_718867914_2_2, D_718867914_3_3, D_718867914_4_4, D_718867914_5_5,D_718867914_6_6, D_718867914_7_7, D_718867914_8_8, D_718867914_9_9, 
                             D_718867914_10_10, D_114314839_D_340854069, D_114314839_D_600462977, D_746012894, D_694265648, D_446999144, Connect_ID
                             FROM `nih-nci-dceg-connect-prod-6d04.FlatConnect.module1_v1` WHERE Connect_ID IS NOT NULL")

sql_M1_2 <- bq_project_query(project, 
                             query = "SELECT D_276353712, D_659784914, D_607773106_1_1, D_607773106_2_2, D_607773106_3_3, D_607773106_4_4, D_607773106_5_5, D_607773106_6_6, 
                             D_607773106_7_7,  D_607773106_8_8, D_607773106_9_9,  D_607773106_10_10, D_607773106_11_11, D_607773106_12_12, D_607773106_13_13, D_718867914_1_1, 
                             D_718867914_2_2, D_718867914_3_3, D_718867914_4_4, D_718867914_5_5,D_718867914_6_6, D_718867914_7_7, D_718867914_8_8, D_718867914_9_9, 
                             D_718867914_10_10, D_114314839_D_340854069, D_114314839_D_600462977, D_746012894, D_694265648, D_446999144, Connect_ID
                             FROM `nih-nci-dceg-connect-prod-6d04.FlatConnect.module1_v2` WHERE Connect_ID IS NOT NULL")

M1_V1 <- bq_table_download(sql_M1_1, bigint = "integer64")
M1_V2 <- bq_table_download(sql_M1_2, bigint = "integer64")

# Select matching column names
M1_V1_vars <- colnames(M1_V1)
M1_V2_vars <- colnames(M1_V2)
common_vars <- intersect(M1_V1_vars, M1_V2_vars)

# Subset to common columns
M1_V1_common <- M1_V1[, common_vars]
M1_V2_common <- M1_V2[, common_vars]

# Add version indicator
M1_V1_common$version <- 1
M1_V2_common$version <- 2

# Identify columns with mismatched types
mismatched_cols <- names(M1_V1_common)[sapply(names(M1_V1_common), function(col) {
  class(M1_V1_common[[col]]) != class(M1_V2_common[[col]])
})]

# Convert mismatched columns to character for consistency
M1_V1_common <- M1_V1_common %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(mismatched_cols), as.character))
M1_V2_common <- M1_V2_common %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(mismatched_cols), as.character))

# Combine both versions for participants who completed both
M1_common <- bind_rows(M1_V1_common, M1_V2_common) %>%
  arrange(Connect_ID, desc(version))

# For columns unique to each version
V1_only_vars <- setdiff(M1_V1_vars, common_vars)
V2_only_vars <- setdiff(M1_V2_vars, common_vars)

# Subset each version for unique columns and add version indicator
m1_v1_only <- M1_V1[, c("Connect_ID", V1_only_vars)] %>%
  mutate(version = 1)
m1_v2_only <- M1_V2[, c("Connect_ID", V2_only_vars)] %>%
  mutate(version = 2)

# Combine the unique and common data

M1_common$Connect_ID <- as.numeric(M1_common$Connect_ID)
m1_v1_only$Connect_ID <- as.numeric(m1_v1_only$Connect_ID)
m1_v2_only$Connect_ID <- as.numeric(m1_v2_only$Connect_ID)

m1_common_v1 <- left_join(M1_common, m1_v1_only, by = c("Connect_ID", "version"))

m1_common_v1$Connect_ID <- as.numeric(m1_common_v1$Connect_ID)
m1_combined_v1v2 <- left_join(m1_common_v1, m1_v2_only, by = c("Connect_ID", "version"))

# Filter for complete cases where specific completion criteria are met
m1_complete <- m1_combined_v1v2 %>%
  filter(Connect_ID %in% recr_m1$Connect_ID[recr_m1$d_949302066 == 231311385]) %>%
  arrange(desc(version))

# Remove duplicates, keeping only the most recent version for each Connect_ID
m1_complete_nodup <- m1_complete[!duplicated(m1_complete$Connect_ID),]

m1_complete_nodup$Connect_ID <- as.numeric(m1_complete_nodup$Connect_ID)


### Define requirements of the data: active or passive,  user profile done, consented, mod1 done, verified
parts <- "SELECT Connect_ID, token, d_564964481,d_795827569, d_544150384, d_827220437, d_976570371
FROM `nih-nci-dceg-connect-prod-6d04.FlatConnect.participants` 
where Connect_ID IS NOT NULL and (d_512820379='486306141' OR d_512820379='854703046') and d_821247024='197316935' and
(d_919254129='353358909') and (d_699625233='353358909') and (d_949302066='231311385')"
parts_table <- bq_project_query(project, parts)
parts_data <- bq_table_download(parts_table, bigint = "integer64")

parts_data$Connect_ID <- as.numeric(parts_data$Connect_ID) ###need to convert type- m1... is double and parts is character


merged= left_join(parts_data, m1_complete_nodup, by="Connect_ID")
dim(merged)


data_tib_base <- as_tibble(merged)


knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = NA)

```



```{r bmi, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

#knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev = "png", fig.path = "")


data_tib_base$D_114314839_D_340854069=as.numeric(data_tib_base$D_114314839_D_340854069)
data_tib_base$D_114314839_D_600462977=as.numeric(data_tib_base$D_114314839_D_600462977)

data_tib_base$in_D_inches= (ifelse(is.na(data_tib_base$D_114314839_D_340854069), 0,(data_tib_base$D_114314839_D_340854069*12)))+ 
  (ifelse(is.na(data_tib_base$D_114314839_D_600462977), 0, (data_tib_base$D_114314839_D_600462977))) 

data_tib_base$D_746012894=as.numeric(data_tib_base$D_746012894) 
data_tib_base$D_746012894=round(data_tib_base$D_746012894, digits=0)

data_tib_base= data_tib_base %>%  mutate(BMI= (D_746012894/in_D_inches^2)*703)

bmi_box= data_tib_base %>%  filter(!is.na(BMI)) %>%  ggplot(aes(x=BMI))+
    xlab("Score") + geom_boxplot()+  ggtitle("BMI Distribution of Participants") + xlim(c(0,100))

bmi_box

```



```{r By_PrimRelCancer, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(gt)

#-------------------------- FAMILY HX LOGIC -----------------------------------------------

# Helper: get loop columns in numeric order
get_loop_cols <- function(data, prefix) {
  cols <- names(data)[grepl(paste0("^", prefix, "\\d+_\\d+$"), names(data))]
  loop_num <- as.integer(sub(paste0("^", prefix, "(\\d+)_\\1$"), "\\1", cols))
  cols[order(loop_num)]
}

# Overall loop logic: original behavior
eval_loop_status <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  if (any(x == 353358909)) return("Yes")
  if (any(x == 178420302)) return("Don't Know")
  if (all(x == 104430631)) return("No")
  
  "Skipped this Question"
}

# Per-relative loop logic: if any asked loop is missing, count as skipped
eval_loop_status_by_n <- function(x, n) {
  if (is.na(n) || n <= 0) return(NA_character_)  # not asked
  
  x <- x[seq_len(min(n, length(x)))]
  
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  if (any(is.na(x))) return("Skipped this Question")
  if (any(x == 353358909)) return("Yes")
  if (any(x == 178420302)) return("Don't Know")
  if (all(x == 104430631)) return("No")
  
  "Skipped this Question"
}

# Single non-loop item
eval_single_status <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return("Skipped this Question")
  if (x == 353358909) return("Yes")
  if (x == 178420302) return("Don't Know")
  if (x == 104430631) return("No")
  "Error"
}

# Loop variables
sib_cols   <- get_loop_cols(data_tib_base, "D_607773106_")
child_cols <- get_loop_cols(data_tib_base, "D_718867914_")

# Family Hx Status
family <- data_tib_base %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    mom_status = eval_single_status(D_276353712),
    dad_status = eval_single_status(D_659784914),
    
    sib_status = {
      n_sib <- as.integer(D_694265648)
      sib_vals <- if (is.na(n_sib) || n_sib <= 0) {
        numeric(0)
      } else {
        c_across(all_of(sib_cols))[seq_len(min(n_sib, length(sib_cols)))]
      }
      eval_loop_status_by_n(sib_vals, n_sib)
    },
    
    child_status = {
      n_child <- as.integer(D_446999144)
      child_vals <- if (is.na(n_child) || n_child <= 0) {
        numeric(0)
      } else {
        c_across(all_of(child_cols))[seq_len(min(n_child, length(child_cols)))]
      }
      eval_loop_status_by_n(child_vals, n_child)
    },
    
    # Keep the original overall logic
    loop_status = {
      n_sib <- as.integer(D_694265648)
      n_child <- as.integer(D_446999144)
      
      sib_vals <- if (is.na(n_sib) || n_sib <= 0) {
        numeric(0)
      } else {
        c_across(all_of(sib_cols))[seq_len(min(n_sib, length(sib_cols)))]
      }
      
      child_vals <- if (is.na(n_child) || n_child <= 0) {
        numeric(0)
      } else {
        c_across(all_of(child_cols))[seq_len(min(n_child, length(child_cols)))]
      }
      
      eval_loop_status(c(sib_vals, child_vals))
    },
    
    status = case_when(
      D_276353712 == 353358909 |
        D_659784914 == 353358909 |
        loop_status == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      
      is.na(D_276353712) |
        is.na(D_659784914) |
        is.na(loop_status) ~ "Skipped this Question",
      
      D_276353712 == 178420302 |
        D_659784914 == 178420302 |
        loop_status == "Don't Know" ~ "Don't Know",
      
      D_276353712 == 104430631 &
        D_659784914 == 104430631 &
        loop_status == "No" ~ "No",
      
      TRUE ~ "Error"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-loop_status)

#-------------------------- TABLE 1: OVERALL -----------------------------------------------

dt_fam_canc_summary <- family %>%
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c("Yes", "No", "Don't Know", "Skipped this Question"))) %>%
  group_by(status, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(percentage = 100 * n / sum(n))

dt_fam_canc_summary %>%
  gt() %>%
  fmt_number(columns = "percentage", decimals = 2) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = "n", decimals = 0, use_seps = TRUE) %>%
  tab_header(title = md("Primary Relative(s) Diagnosed With Cancer")) %>%
  cols_label(n = md("**N**"), status = md("**Answer**"), percentage = md("**%**")) %>%
  grand_summary_rows(columns = c(n, percentage), fns = ~ sum(., na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  tab_options(stub.font.weight = "bold") %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_body(columns = status)
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Primary relatives consist of parents, siblings, and children.",
    placement = "left"
  )

#-------------------------- TABLE 2: BY RELATIVE --------------------------------------------

dt_fam_canc_by_relative <- family %>%
  select(mom_status, dad_status, sib_status, child_status) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "relative",
    values_to = "status"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(status)) %>%   # drops not-asked siblings/children
  mutate(
    relative = factor(
      recode(relative,
             mom_status = "Mom",
             dad_status = "Dad",
             sib_status = "Sibling",
             child_status = "Child"),
      levels = c("Mom", "Dad", "Sibling", "Child")
    ),
    status = factor(status, levels = c("Yes", "No", "Don't Know", "Skipped this Question"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(relative, status, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  complete(relative, status, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  group_by(relative) %>%
  mutate(percentage = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(cell = paste0(n, " (", round(percentage, 2), "%)")) %>%
  select(relative, status, cell) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = relative, values_from = cell)

dt_fam_canc_by_relative %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = md("Primary Relative(s) Diagnosed With Cancer")) %>%
  cols_label(
    status = md("**Answer**"),
    Mom = md("**Mom**"),
    Dad = md("**Dad**"),
    Sibling = md("**Sibling**"),
    Child = md("**Child**")
  ) %>%
  tab_options(stub.font.weight = "bold") %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Note: Not all participants have siblings and/or children. The denominator for these columns will differ accordingly.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(Sibling, Child))
  )

```




\newpage

```{r query3, include=FALSE}


querymod3 <- "SELECT Connect_ID, D_947205597_D_712653855, D_798549704, D_763164658, D_947205597_D_198133418, D_182431332, D_789271762, D_947205597_D_706254326, D_624111331, D_238422161, D_639684251, D_789271762, D_751046675, D_564438246
FROM `nih-nci-dceg-connect-prod-6d04.FlatConnect.module3_v1` where Connect_ID IS NOT NULL"
mod3_table <- bq_project_query(project, querymod3)
mod3_data <- bq_table_download(mod3_table, bigint = "integer64")
mod3_data$Connect_ID <- as.numeric(mod3_data$Connect_ID)


data_all3= left_join(parts_data, mod3_data, by="Connect_ID")

data_all3 <- data_all3 %>% filter(d_976570371==231311385)

data_tib_all3 <- as_tibble(data_all3)


```




```{r cigerette, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# SMOKING - DERIVED (categorical):
# Logic rules (approved by: M.Gaudet/N.Freedman/C.Abnet - 1/22/26)

# NEVER SMOKER
# - Ever/Never Smoking = No
# - OR Ever/Never Smoking = Yes AND Lifetime Cigarettes [CIG1] = 10 or less OR 11–49
# Rationale: Below threshold for meaningful biological exposure

# CURRENT SMOKER
# - Ever/Never Smoking = Yes AND Lifetime Cigarettes [CIG1] = 50–99 OR 100+
#   AND Last Time Smoked [CIG5] = In the past month
# - OR Ever/Never Smoking = Yes AND Lifetime Cigarettes [CIG1] = 50–99 OR 100+
#   AND Last Time Smoked [CIG5] = More than a month ago, but within the past year
# - OR Ever/Never Smoking = Yes AND Lifetime Cigarettes [CIG1] = 50–99 OR 100+
#   AND CIG5 is missing AND Smoke Now [CIG4] = Yes (rarely / some days / everyday)
# Rationale: Any smoking within the past year is classified as current smoking

# FORMER SMOKER
# - Ever/Never Smoking = Yes AND Lifetime Cigarettes [CIG1] = 50–99 OR 100+
#   AND Last Time Smoked [CIG5] = More than 1 year ago
# - OR Ever/Never Smoking = Yes AND Lifetime Cigarettes [CIG1] = 50–99 OR 100+
#   AND CIG5 is missing AND Smoke Now [CIG4] = No, not at all
# - OR Ever/Never Smoking = Yes AND Lifetime Cigarettes [CIG1] is missing
#   AND Smoke Now [CIG4] = No, not at all AND Last Time Smoked [CIG5] = More than 1 year ago
# Rationale: Indicates past smoking without recent use

# MISSING / SKIPPED
# - Any response pattern not captured by the rules above

# General Recommendations:
# - Threshold of 50+ lifetime cigarettes used to define meaningful smoking exposure 
# - Analytic Note: 100+ in lifetime is usually used in other epidemiological studies 
# - Any smoking within past year should be classified as current smoker
# - CIG4 (smoke now) is used as fallback when CIG5 (last smoked) is missing
# ------------------------------------------------------------------

cig_frequency= data_tib_all3  %>% 
  dplyr::rename("Ever_Never" = "D_947205597_D_712653855",
                "CIG1" = "D_763164658",
                "CIG4" = "D_639684251",
                "CIG5" = "D_798549704") %>% 
  mutate(often= case_when((Ever_Never==0 | 
                             (Ever_Never==1 & (CIG1==151488193 | CIG1==805449318)))~"Never a Cigarette Smoker",
                          
                             (Ever_Never==1 & 
                                (CIG1==486319890 | CIG1==132232896) & 
                                (CIG5==317567178 | CIG5==484055234 |
                                   (is.na(CIG5) & 
                                      (!is.na(CIG4) & CIG4!=419415087)) 
                                 ) 
                              )~"Currently a Cigarette Smoker",
                          
                             (Ever_Never==1 & 
                                (
                                  ((CIG1==486319890 | CIG1==132232896) &
                                   (CIG5==802197176 |
                                      (is.na(CIG5) & CIG4==419415087)) 
                                  ) |
                                (is.na(CIG1) & CIG4==419415087 & CIG5==802197176)) )~"Formerly a Cigarette Smoker",
                          
                             TRUE~"Skipped all these questions"))

dt_cig_frequency_summary <- cig_frequency %>% group_by(often) %>%  dplyr::summarize(n=n(), percentage=100*n/nrow(.))  %>% dplyr::ungroup() %>%  dplyr::select(often, n, percentage)


dt_cig_frequency_summary %>%  gt::gt() %>%  
  fmt_number(columns = "percentage", decimals = 2) %>% 
  fmt_number(columns = "n", decimals=0, use_seps = TRUE) %>% 
  tab_header(title = md("Frequency of Cigarette Smoking")) %>% 
  cols_label(n= md("**N**"), often = md("**Answer**"), percentage = md("**%**")) %>% 
  grand_summary_rows(columns=c(n, percentage),fns = ~sum(.,na.rm = T))|>
  tab_options(
    stub.font.weight = "bold"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = often,
    )
  ) 


```




```{r cigar, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

cigar_frequency= data_tib_all3  %>% 
  dplyr::rename("Ever_Never" = "D_947205597_D_198133418",
                "CIGAR1" = "D_182431332",
                "CIGAR4" = "D_564438246",
                "CIGAR5" = "D_789271762") %>% 
  mutate(often= case_when((Ever_Never==0 | 
                             (Ever_Never==1 & (CIGAR1==151488193 | CIGAR1==805449318)))~"Never a Cigar Smoker",
                          
                             (Ever_Never==1 & 
                                (CIGAR1==486319890 | CIGAR1==132232896) & 
                                (CIGAR5==317567178 | CIGAR5==484055234 |
                                   (is.na(CIGAR5) & 
                                      (!is.na(CIGAR4) & CIGAR4!=419415087)) 
                                 ) 
                              )~"Currently a Cigar Smoker",
                          
                             (Ever_Never==1 & 
                                (
                                  ((CIGAR1==486319890 | CIGAR1==132232896) &
                                   (CIGAR5==802197176 |
                                      (is.na(CIGAR5) & CIGAR4==419415087)) 
                                  ) |
                                (is.na(CIGAR1) & CIGAR4==419415087 & CIGAR5==802197176)) )~"Formerly a Cigar Smoker",
                          
                             TRUE~"Skipped all these questions"))



dt_cigar_frequency_summary <- cigar_frequency %>% group_by(often) %>%  dplyr::summarize(n=n(), percentage=100*n/nrow(.))  %>% dplyr::ungroup() %>%  dplyr::select(often, n, percentage)

dt_cigar_frequency_summary %>%  gt::gt() %>%  
  fmt_number(columns = "percentage", decimals = 2) %>% 
  fmt_number(columns = "n", decimals=0, use_seps = TRUE) %>% 
  tab_header(title = md("Frequency of Cigar Smoking")) %>% 
  cols_label(n= md("**N**"), often = md("**Answer**"), percentage = md("**%**")) %>% 
  grand_summary_rows(columns=c(n, percentage),fns = ~sum(.,na.rm = T))|>
  tab_options(
    stub.font.weight = "bold"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = often,
    )
  ) 


```





```{r ecig, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}


e_cig_frequency= data_tib_all3  %>% 
  dplyr::rename("Ever_Never" = "D_947205597_D_706254326",
                "ECIG1" = "D_624111331",
                "ECIG4" = "D_751046675",
                "ECIG5" = "D_238422161") %>% 
  mutate(often= case_when((Ever_Never==0 | 
                             (Ever_Never==1 & (ECIG1==151488193 | ECIG1==805449318)))~"Never a Cigarette Smoker",
                          
                             (Ever_Never==1 & 
                                (ECIG1==486319890 | ECIG1==132232896) & 
                                (ECIG5==317567178 | ECIG5==484055234 |
                                   (is.na(ECIG5) & 
                                      (!is.na(ECIG4) & ECIG4!=419415087)) 
                                 ) 
                              )~"Currently a Cigarette Smoker",
                          
                             (Ever_Never==1 & 
                                (
                                  ((ECIG1==486319890 | ECIG1==132232896) &
                                   (ECIG5==802197176 |
                                      (is.na(ECIG5) & ECIG4==419415087)) 
                                  ) |
                                (is.na(ECIG1) & ECIG4==419415087 & ECIG5==802197176)) )~"Formerly a Cigarette Smoker",
                          
                             TRUE~"Skipped all these questions"))



dt_e_cig_frequency_summary <- e_cig_frequency %>% group_by(often) %>%  dplyr::summarize(n=n(), percentage=100*n/nrow(.))  %>% dplyr::ungroup() %>%  dplyr::select(often, n, percentage)

dt_e_cig_frequency_summary %>%  gt::gt() %>%  
  fmt_number(columns = "percentage", decimals = 2) %>% 
  fmt_number(columns = "n", decimals=0, use_seps = TRUE) %>% 
  tab_header(title = md("Frequency of Electronic Cigarette Smoking")) %>% 
  cols_label(n= md("**N**"), often = md("**Answer**"), percentage = md("**%**")) %>% 
  grand_summary_rows(columns=c(n, percentage),fns = ~sum(.,na.rm = T))|>
  tab_options(
    stub.font.weight = "bold"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(
      cell_text(weight = "bold")
    ),
    locations = cells_body(
      columns = often,
    )
  ) 


```
